0. I s the matter promised
In all Horary questions, the sub-lord of the cusp of the house
pertaining to the subject matter of query is the deciding factor to
determine whether the matter will be favourable or not. If the sub-lord
is favourable, then in the conjoined period of the significators of the
particular house. the event will materialize.
E. Moon's position at query.

jupiter lord of 3 and 6. It is deposited in the constellation of Jupiter. and
sub of Voous lord of lagna in 10. The Moon itself is the lord of the lOU'
house. Mcon is thus a powerful significator of hous~ 1, 3, 6 and 10 and
ls position at que,y clearly reveals that the query is related to a honour
winning an election.
